description: Fix create_tweet tool throwing raw Error instead of ToolError, which prevents the MCP server from properly classifying the error.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/x && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace raw Error with ToolError.internal in create_tweet
userStories.description: The create_tweet tool throws `new Error(msg)` instead of `ToolError.internal(msg)` when the tweet creation response is unexpected.
acceptanceCriteria: The throw statement uses ToolError.internal() instead of new Error()
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/x/src/tools/create-tweet.ts (fix error type)

Context:
Line 43:
```typescript
throw new Error(msg ?? `CreateTweet returned unexpected response: ${JSON.stringify(data).slice(0, 500)}`);
```

Change to:
```typescript
throw ToolError.internal(msg ?? `CreateTweet returned unexpected response: ${JSON.stringify(data).slice(0, 500)}`);
```

Ensure `ToolError` is imported from `@opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk`. Check if it's already imported at the top of the file.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the error message content
- Do NOT change the (data as any) access pattern (that's a separate issue)
